message:
feat(freeze): Add missing .drop and .dup opcodes + .catch Zig support

- Add .drop opcode to emitCommonOpcode (discard top of stack)
- Add .dup opcode to emitCommonOpcode (duplicate top of stack)
- Add Zig support for .catch opcode (exception handling)

These were in the shared_ops.txt list but weren't extracted during the
initial refactoring. Now all 133 shared opcodes are fully implemented.

All priority opcodes now have complete C+Zig support:
✅ drop - discard top of stack
✅ dup - duplicate top of stack
✅ catch - exception handling
✅ throw - throw exception (already had Zig)
✅ get_var/get_var_undef - global variable access (already had Zig)
✅ push_atom_value - string constants (already had Zig)
